name: GH_FadePhase
summary: Enumerates the possible states of a ZUI fade animation.

enum_values.name: Hidden
enum_values.summary: Indicates the UI elements ought to be hidden.

enum_values.name: Hiding
enum_values.summary: Indicates the UI elements are in the process of being hidden.

enum_values.name: Shown
enum_values.summary: Indicates the UI elements ought to be shown.

enum_values.name: Showing
enum_values.summary: Indicates the UI elements are in the process of being shown.
